title: Replace OSS guide image publishing with server uploads
description: Replace the publishing asset boundary so guide images are copied to the server uploads directory and Markdown/cover URLs use same-origin /uploads paths instead of OSS/CDN URLs.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN publish payload is prepared THEN coverUrl and Markdown image URLs use /uploads/guides/<slug>/<hash>-<filename>; WHEN an image is missing THEN publishing fails before SQLite import; WHEN image filenames are generated THEN they keep content hash cache-busting; ref: docs/DEPLOYMENT-GUIDE.md:53
review_initial_requirements: Check no OSS AccessKey or OSS client is required for guide image publishing; check upload failure prevents SQLite import; check hash naming remains stable.
review_regression_requirements: Run publish contract checks; check existing Obsidian ![[name.png]] and Markdown image refs still resolve; check same slug republish remains idempotent.

title: Update deploy contracts for persistent uploads outside build bundle
description: Update configuration, contracts, and deployment packaging so guide images are documented as persistent server uploads and are not copied into Git or the .deploy static bundle.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN static deploy bundle is built THEN public/guides/<slug> images are not copied into .deploy/site/guides; WHEN env example is read THEN PUBLISH_UPLOADS_DIR and PUBLISH_UPLOADS_PUBLIC_BASE are documented; WHEN docs are read THEN Nginx /uploads alias and backup risk are explicit; ref: docs/DEPLOYMENT-GUIDE.md:70
review_initial_requirements: Check build-static-deploy does not bundle guide image assets; check .env.example contains publish upload variables but no secrets.
review_regression_requirements: Run build-static-deploy and static shell/API contracts; check existing static pages still serve without bundled guide images.

title: Configure production uploads and republish guides
description: Create the production uploads directory, configure Nginx to serve /uploads directly, deploy updated publishing code, and republish the five guides so SQLite points at same-origin image URLs.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN the five guides are republished THEN /api/guides and /api/guides/<slug> return /uploads/guides image URLs; WHEN https://www.jingcc.cc/guides/gwen-pyke is opened THEN guide images load with naturalWidth > 0 and no horizontal overflow on 390px mobile viewport; WHEN production serves images THEN no guide image URL uses cdn.jingcc.cc, OSS, or /public/guides; ref: docs/DEPLOYMENT-GUIDE.md:101
review_initial_requirements: Check server directory is persistent and writable; check Nginx alias uses /uploads/ to /var/www/TFTBlog-NEXTJS/uploads/; check production changes do not require server-side Next build.
review_regression_requirements: Check PM2 is online, Nginx reload succeeds, API returns five guides, detail page images load from /uploads, and mobile viewport has no horizontal overflow.
